Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-21-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Mnor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Torreano.
John Aspelin, Esq. for Petitioner: Gladis Pacheco, present as Guardian at litem for: Martha Ramirez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $2,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Medical Expenses $301.25
Costs $95.26
A net balance of $1,103.49 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, San Plabo Branch, San Palbo, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
